label: Transparent rice panicle motif
workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a rice panicle botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: One mature rice panicle with graceful arching stems, pale gold grains clustered along fine branching panicles, rice-green leaves, slim green-gold stalk, subtle watery sky-blue reflected highlights on a few leaf edges. Botanical accuracy for Oryza sativa, crisp subject edges, harvest-ready paddy-field silhouette, natural husk texture on grains.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full panicle head, stem, and several narrow rice leaves without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no wheat, no barley, no cattail, no reed plume, no bamboo, no lotus, no paddy landscape, no water body, no vase, no hand, no props, no second subject, no text, no watermark, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Rice Panicle light-mode design-system board
Input image: use the rice panicle transparent motif already visible in this conversation as the motif reference.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE source board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Rice Panicle" / "Rice Panicle". The board must be a wide 4K-class design-system reference, derived from the rice panicle motif: pale-gold rice grains, rice-green leaves and stalks, soft water reflections, and clean paddy-field sky notes.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Rice Panicle, Rice Panicle, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from rice husks, pale-gold grains, rice-green blades, water-sky reflection, paddy mud neutrals, harvest straw, and seed-head branching. The board must read as rice panicle and harvest operations, not wheat, barley, bamboo, generic SaaS, or a floral theme.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 収穫, 水田, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, harvest operations dashboard metric cards, moisture/yield line chart, paddy block bar chart, lot data table, inspection filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, rice husk texture swatches.
Style/medium: premium harvest operations product design system, realistic shadcn/tweakcn UI mockup, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, pale rice-paper surfaces, gold-grain primary controls, rice-green active states, water-sky blue focus rings, straw dividers, clean operations data density, subtle rice-husk texture.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: pale gold rice grain, harvest straw, rice green, deep leaf green, water sky blue, paddy silt neutral, husk beige, ink from rice-leaf shadow, deep paddy mud.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Rice Panicle", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Rice Panicle dark-mode design-system board
Input images: use the rice panicle transparent motif and the LIGHT MODE board titled "Morphous Rice Panicle" already visible in this conversation as the exact system references.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Rice Panicle" / "Rice Panicle". It must feel like the same harvest operations system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the rice panicle motif and the light-mode board language.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Rice Panicle, Rice Panicle, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the rice panicle system language: pale-gold grain controls, harvest straw surfaces, rice-green active states, water-sky blue focus/accent rings, straw dividers, paddy-silt borders, husk beige text highlights, deep leaf and paddy-mud backgrounds, subtle rice-husk texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. It must read as rice panicle and harvest operations, not wheat, barley, bamboo, floral, or generic dark SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 収穫, 水田, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, harvest operations dashboard metric cards, moisture/yield line chart, paddy block bar chart, lot data table, inspection filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, rice husk texture swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep leaf shadow and paddy mud, raised cards in dark olive-silt, husk-beige foreground text, pale-gold and harvest-straw primary controls, rice-green success/active states, water-sky focus rings and charts, straw separators, subtle rice-husk overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: pale gold rice grain, harvest straw, rice green, deep leaf green, water sky blue, paddy silt neutral, husk beige, ink from rice-leaf shadow, deep paddy mud.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Rice Panicle", no illegible microtext.
